creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 204433
drupal 8.6.16 update

I've made a patch which updates www/drupal8 to 8.6.16. I've tested it with poudriere. AS you can see (http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php71/2019-05-17_23h03m02s/logs/drupal8-8.6.16.log) "testport" returns no errors.
